acceptance_criteria: sanitize_identifier and repository_scope_for_path have a single canonical implementation
Priority enum is unified across protocol and core crates
cli_types.rs and web_api_service.rs are split into focused, maintainable modules
description: Eliminated duplicated implementations across crates and unified conflicting type definitions. TASK-031 (done) consolidated sanitize_identifier and repository_scope_for_path into a single canonical implementation in protocol/src/repository_scope.rs. TASK-032 (done) unified Priority type definitions — renamed protocol Priority to RequirementPriority with explicit conversion to core Priority via RequirementPriorityExt trait. TASK-041 (done) split cli_types.rs into 27 per-domain files and web_api_service.rs into per-resource handlers.
title: Consolidate duplicated code and unify shared types
